Caption: Schematic diagram for the Li2S powder synthesis process. (a) Stirring the precursors, (b) Carbonization process at 400 ℃ for 1 h under an air atmosphere and (c) Calcination process at 780 ℃ for 3 h under an argon atmosphere.
